avatar.description: CDN URL of the actor's avatar image.

viewer.description: Viewer-specific state. Only present when the request is authenticated.

profileViewerState.description: Metadata about the requesting account's relationship with the actor. Only present when the request is authenticated.

following.description: AT-URI of the follow record if the viewer follows this actor.

followedBy.description: AT-URI of the follow record if this actor follows the viewer.
